log: REASONING: Power Word Stun on Vedalken — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Vedalken — Armored Tank. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Vedalken — Armored Tank.
→ Vedalken — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 20] FAIL! 36 necrotic damage. HP: 23/59
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (11/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Vedalken — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
